def positive_file_object_returned_or_stored_without_clear_close_path():
    rule_id = "file_object_returned_or_stored_without_clear_close_path"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "File object returned from a function or stored in an attribute without a guaranteed close path."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
